news.title: Dishonored developer Arkane is reportedly one of five studios Microsoft is targeting to close down as part of its big 'reset'
news.titleEN: Dishonored developer Arkane is reportedly one of five studios Microsoft is targeting to close down as part of its big 'reset'
news.desc: Arkane Studios, the developer behind the Dishonored series and the upcoming Blade, is among the studios Microsoft is currently considering closing down. That's according to a new report from The Verge, citing sources familiar with the plan. Read more
